case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MARYLOU AGUILAR et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, MARYLOU DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-04-2011
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $286.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, MARYLOU
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, MARYLOU $7,098.11 PRINCIPAL, $982.07 INTEREST, $286.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,366.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-11-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, MARYLOU
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION PRUSUANT TO CCP 1033 (B) (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SNYDER, DAVID B. SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
